name: 03_us500_pullback_ema_trend_m15
hypothesis: US500 M15 during US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC) exhibits persistent intraday trend continuation; buying shallow pullbacks to EMA20 within an EMA50>EMA200 uptrend (and mirror for downtrend) produces positive expectancy with ADX>20 regime filter. Avoids counter-trend and Asia chop that hurt Donchian.

entry_rules.long: trend_up AND low <= EMA(20) AND close > EMA(20) AND RSI(14) between 40 and 65
entry_rules.short: trend_down AND high >= EMA(20) AND close < EMA(20) AND RSI(14) between 35 and 60
entry_rules.confirmation: bullish/bearish engulfing or close in upper/lower 40% of bar range

exit_rules.stop_loss: swing_low(5) - 0.2*ATR(14) for longs; mirror for shorts; cap at 1.5*ATR
exit_rules.trailing: EMA(20) cross or 2.0*ATR chandelier after 1.2 R

acceptance_notes: US cash-session-only reduces noise trades. Expected >250 trades/3yr on M15. Family diverges from BB mean-reversion and from session breakout.
